overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a tropical coastal shantytown at night. The camera moves along wooden stilt walkways over water, through covered passages beneath elevated houses, and emerges into an open dirt courtyard before approaching a patio area with plastic furniture. High-quality game engine graphics depict an atmospheric Caribbean or island setting with dramatic nighttime lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow wooden walkway suspended between two weathered stilt houses over dark water. The camera moves forward steadily through the tight corridor, with the teal wooden facade of the right house and the gray planks of the left house framing the view. Distant warm lights glow across the water under an overcast night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath stilt houses with wooden support pillars

events.description: moves from open walkway into covered area beneath stilt houses with wooden pillars

agents.ego_description: walking under elevated structures among thick wooden support pillars

entered.detail: thick wooden posts supporting the elevated houses above

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-covered area beneath the stilt houses, navigating between thick wooden support pillars. The right house exits the frame as the path curves slightly left, while the left house recedes into the mid-ground. The wooden plank walkway continues over the water, now sheltered by the overhead structures.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide dirt courtyard under the night sky. A wooden gazebo stands in the distance while a blue house with vibrant flowering bushes appears on the right. An NPC stands near the house watching as the camera approaches. The ground transitions from wooden planks to sandy dirt.

events.description: turns left to move past the NPC and toward a lit patio area

agents.ego_description: turning left to bypass the NPC and continue toward a patio area with outdoor furniture

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to navigate around the NPC and the blue house, moving along a dirt path between a green wooden building on the left and a white fence on the right. The gazebo recedes behind as the path curves toward a distant lit area with outdoor furniture visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a patio area featuring a white plastic table with four chairs and a large illuminated orange umbrella. Moving closer to the table, the camera slows and stops to focus on a metal bowl sitting on the table surface. The surrounding green building and fence recede as the camera centers on the patio furniture under the warm artificial light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic stilt-house corridor into an open, illuminated residential patio at night. It begins by moving steadily along a narrow wooden walkway suspended over dark water, framed by weathered teal and gray facades under an overcast sky. As the camera glides forward, the path curves into a semi-covered area beneath the houses, navigating between thick wooden support pillars before the overhead structures give way to a wide, sandy dirt courtyard. The scene then shifts past a blue house with vibrant flowering bushes and a waiting NPC, turning left along a dirt path between a green building and a white fence. Finally, the camera emerges into a warmly lit patio area, slowing to a stop as it focuses on a metal bowl resting on a white plastic table beneath a large orange umbrella.
